items.final_wording: Provides systemic, neurologic, onset, associated-feature, and pattern-change red-flag domains.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Headaches in Adults
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth headache documentation; partial because the baseline workflow has no adult-only filter and is not telehealth-only.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Provides systemic, neurologic, onset, associated-feature, and pattern-change red-flag domains.

items.rationale: The exact DHA red-flag section supports onset, severity, associated symptoms, relevant negatives, risk context and time-critical symptoms only when assessed; it does not infer a secondary cause.

items.final_wording: Identifies headache presentations requiring urgent face-to-face assessment.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Headaches in Adults
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth headache documentation; partial because the baseline workflow has no adult-only filter and is not telehealth-only.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Identifies headache presentations requiring urgent face-to-face assessment.

items.rationale: The exact emergency-evaluation section supports recording measured vital data, focused assessment, appearance, existing results, escalation and specialist discussion only when clinician-completed.

items.final_wording: Defines adult headache telehealth scope in DHA-licensed facilities and emergency exclusions.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Headaches in Adults
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth headache documentation; partial because the baseline workflow has no adult-only filter and is not telehealth-only.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines adult headache telehealth scope in DHA-licensed facilities and emergency exclusions.

items.rationale: The adult virtual-care scope was reviewed; pediatric, pregnancy, trauma and established neurological diagnoses require separate evidence.
